testcase.classname: concatQueryString returns url unchanged when array is empty
testcase.name: concatQueryString returns url unchanged when array is empty

testcase.name: concatQueryString appends single param with ?

testcase.name: concatQueryString appends multiple params with & separator

testcase.classname: concatQueryString handles two params correctly
testcase.name: concatQueryString handles two params correctly

testcase.classname: concatQueryString returns base url unchanged when empty array passed
testcase.name: concatQueryString returns base url unchanged when empty array passed

testcase.classname: data_header_client exports an array with 3 menu items
testcase.name: data_header_client exports an array with 3 menu items

testcase.classname: data_header_client first item is Notification
testcase.name: data_header_client first item is Notification

testcase.classname: data_header_client second item is Help & FAQs
testcase.name: data_header_client second item is Help & FAQs

testcase.classname: data_header_client third item is EN
testcase.name: data_header_client third item is EN

testcase.classname: data_header_client all items have links and id fields
testcase.name: data_header_client all items have links and id fields

testcase.classname: YasError creates with default values when no args given
testcase.name: YasError creates with default values when no args given

testcase.classname: YasError uses status when provided
testcase.name: YasError uses status when provided

testcase.classname: YasError parses statusCode string when status not provided
testcase.name: YasError parses statusCode string when status not provided

testcase.classname: YasError uses status over statusCode when both provided
testcase.name: YasError uses status over statusCode when both provided

testcase.classname: YasError sets title and details correctly
testcase.name: YasError sets title and details correctly

testcase.classname: YasError uses first fieldError as message when fieldErrors provided
testcase.name: YasError uses first fieldError as message when fieldErrors provided

testcase.classname: YasError uses detail as message when fieldErrors is empty
testcase.name: YasError uses detail as message when fieldErrors is empty

testcase.classname: YasError is an instance of Error
testcase.name: YasError is an instance of Error

testcase.name: formatPrice formats zero as USD currency

testcase.name: formatPrice formats a positive price

testcase.classname: formatPrice formats a large price
testcase.name: formatPrice formats a large price

testcase.name: formatPrice returns a string

testcase.classname: formatPrice formats price with correct USD format
testcase.name: formatPrice formats price with correct USD format

testcase.name: apiClientService.post sets default Content-type header

testcase.name: apiClientService.post uses custom contentType when provided

testcase.name: apiClientService.post removes Content-type when body is FormData

testcase.name: error handling re-throws when fetch rejects

testcase.classname: CORS redirect handling executes without error on cors+redirected response
testcase.name: CORS redirect handling executes without error on cors+redirected response

testcase.classname: CORS redirect handling does not redirect on basic non-redirected response
testcase.name: CORS redirect handling does not redirect on basic non-redirected response

testcase.classname: useDebounce returns initial value immediately
testcase.name: useDebounce returns initial value immediately

testcase.classname: useDebounce does not update value before delay has passed
testcase.name: useDebounce does not update value before delay has passed

testcase.classname: useDebounce updates value after delay has passed
testcase.name: useDebounce updates value after delay has passed

testcase.classname: useDebounce resets timer if value changes before delay
testcase.name: useDebounce resets timer if value changes before delay

testcase.classname: useDebounce handles undefined value
